@startuml
actor ListPrivateImpl as "ListPrivateImpl" #9FB4D3 
participant ProfileRetrievalService as "ProfileRetrievalService" #DEE6FF 
database DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl as "DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl" #F0EBB8 
entity DFSSystem as "DFSSystem" #C2FFFF 
control DFSConnectionService as "DFSConnectionService" #FFE5CC 
boundary DFSConnectionServiceImpl as "DFSConnectionServiceImpl" #CCCCFF 
collections DFSConnection as "DFSConnection" #DDAACC 
interface GsonSerde as "GsonSerde" #BBAAEE 
bucket BucketAccessService as "BucketAccessService" #EEEEBD 
class BucketAccessServiceImpl as "BucketAccessServiceImpl" #FFF1CE 
queue DfsCredentialsService as "DFSCredentialsService" #FEEDDC 
frame DfsCredentialsServiceImpl as "DFSCredentialsServiceImpl" #FADED7 
folder DocumentListService as "DocumentListService" #DBEADE 
clouds ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl as "ListPathDecryptingServiceImpl" #CEDAF2 
package ListPathNonDecrpytingServiceImpl as "ListPathNonDecrpytingServiceImpl" #CFDEF3 

==resolvePrivateLocation==
activate ListPrivateImpl
  activate ProfileRetrievalService  
    privateProfile ->>privateProfile :   
      deactivate ProfileRetrievalService    
        activate DFSBasedProfileStorageImpl        
          systemDfS -->systemDfS :           
            activate DFSSystem            
              DFSACcess->>DFSACess:               
                DeActivate DFSSystem                
                  obtain-->obtain:                  
                    Activate DFSConnection                    
                      Obtain-->>Obtain                      
                        Active DFSConnection                        
                          dfsconnection<<-dfsconnection                          
                            deactive DFSConnection                            
                              locatePrivateprofile<--locatePrivateprofile                              
                                active DFSbasedProfilstorageimpl                                
                                  bucketpath<-bucketpath                                  
                                    getBlob----getblob                                    
                                      payload---payload                                       
                                          fromjson------fromJson                                          
                                            t-------t                                            
                                              userprivatprofiel-----userPrivteProfie                                              
                                                UserPrviateprofle--------Userpriveateprofil                                                  
                                                  Privateaccessfor----------privateaccesFor                                                   
                                                      activae Bucketaccessservice                                                      
                                                        privtaeaccssesfoer------------privateAccsesFoer                                                         
                                                            Activated BucektAcceServicelmpl                                                             
                                                                pricateuserecredentails-------------------------priavetUserrcredentials                                                                     
                                                                    activated dfscerdentialsevice                                                                       
                                                                      priaveusrcrendentials--------------------pivateusecrdntials                                                                           
                                                                          actived dFscredentialseriviceimlp                                                                               
                                                                              dfscrdenitals--------------------------------dfcsrednetialas                                                                                 
                                                                                  deactivated fscredserviceimp;                                                                                   
                                                                                    dfscedenitlas------------------------------dfscredneitas                                                                                     
                                                                                        decativted fdcresednailtservcie                                                                                       
                                                                                            dfsaaces-------------------------------dsfaccceses                                                                                               
                                                                                               desctivated buckatacce service impl                                                                                                        
                                                                                                   dsfaacsese-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------list

                                                                                                         obatin--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------obtian

@enduml
